note: Dates marked verified=true are confirmed via git commit history. Dates marked verified=false need human validation (contract deployment dates, Discord events, etc.).

events.name: Mibera Interface first commit
events.notes: Next.js + wagmi + bun scaffold. DrugCard, VendorPage, CartPage within 48 hours.

events.name: Mibera Maker contract deployment
events.notes: ERC-721C deployment of 10,000 tokens. Forge init in mibera-contracts: 2023-11-30.
events.source: mibera-contracts git (forge init only — deployment date unverified)

events.name: Mibera mint
events.notes: 4.2 BERA mint price. Presale system merged 2025-03-18. Mint added to site 2025-04-29.

events.name: MiberaSets deployment
events.notes: 12 tiered ERC-1155 tokens. Renamed 2024-09-04. 481 supply, 309 holders.

events.name: Codex repository created
events.source: GitHub API: gh repo view --json createdAt → 2026-01-15T20:19:41Z

events.name: Candies launch
events.notes: ERC-1155 collectible candies. Contract addresses updated in interface 2025-04-19.

events.name: Presale system live
events.notes: Multi-phase presale with merkle trees, provably fair randomization (Fisher-Yates).

events.name: SMF Forum launched
events.notes: Simple Machines Forum clone — faithful typography, layout, and logo.

events.name: HoneyGPT Phase 2
events.notes: Threaded conversations + real database tools — AI becomes a marketplace vendor.
